title: Mace Roulette Manhunt
description: This plugin select a random player and give him a mace and manhunt plays
body:
## 👑 Mace Manhunt: The Ultimate Chase Begins!

The Minecraft classic **Manhunt** returns with a burst of new energy! Get ready for a cinematic, adrenaline-fueled game of cat-and-mouse centered around the game's newest, most destructive weapon: the **Mace**.

This isn't just a chase—it's the peak of survival artistry!

---

### 🔥 The Core of the Game: Mace Mayhem

Mace Manhunt reinvents the popular game mode by putting Minecraft's newest weapon, the Mace, at the core of an epic chase.

* **The Hunter:** Be the fearsome pursuer wielding the legendary Mace.
* **The Runners:** Be the ones using your wits, collaboration, and speed to survive.

Will you wield the unstoppable force, or will you run for your life until your last breath?

### ✨ Key Features

#### 🛡️ The Hunter's Might
* **The Legendary Mace:** An unbreakable, custom-enchanted Hunter's Mace featuring **Wind Burst II**. Jump high and feel the devastation!
* **Dedicated Tracker:** A special Hunter's Compass always points to the nearest Runner, keeping your prey in constant sight.
* **Wind Power:** Periodically receive **Wind Charges** to quickly close the distance and dominate the battlefield.

#### 🏃 The Runner's Chance
* **Your Only Shield:** You start with one **Totem of Undying**. That's your second chance; after that, you're on your own!
* **The Goal: Survive:** Simple yet challenging: gather resources, set up traps, and outlast the Hunter!

#### 🎬 Cinematic Selection
* **The Choosing:** Every game kicks off with a breathtaking sequence. Players are teleported to a random platform, and as a light cycles through the players around the central Mace, the chosen one is instantly transformed into the Hunter!

#### 🗺️ Dynamic & Replayable
* **Random Arenas:** Each match starts in a **completely new, randomly selected location** in your world. You'll never play the same game twice, ensuring a fresh experience every single time!

#### 🖥️ User-Friendly Experience
* **Spectator on Death:** Don't get left out! When eliminated, Runners automatically switch to spectator mode, allowing them to watch the thrilling remainder of the match unfold.
* **Configurable Head Start:** Give the Runners a critical advantage. A customizable **Grace Period** freezes the Hunter in place, giving the Runners crucial time to escape and strategize.

#### ⚙️ Fully Customizable
* **Tailored to Your Server:** Control the entire experience! Almost all messages, item names, and gameplay settings (like Grace Period duration and Wind Charge cooldown) can be easily configured in the **`config.yml`** file.

---

### 🕹️ How to Play (Simple Commands)

* **Set Lobby:** Set the location where players will return after the game.
    * `/mm setlobby`
* **Add Players:** Add a player to the match.
    * `/mm add <player>`
* **Start the Hunt:** Initiate the cinematic selection and begin the chase!
    * `/mm start`

> For a full list of commands, type: **`/mm`**

**Download Mace Manhunt and jump into the most action-packed chase Minecraft has to offer!**
